summary: Frontend-only UI/UX bug fix verification completed. All 5 reported issues have been fixed and verified via Playwright browser testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is correct - separate state for each tab (characterJob, panelJob, storyJob) prevents state bleeding
toastShown tracking prevents infinite toast loops
Select boxes have text-white class for proper visibility
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX bugs fixed. Comix AI and GIF Maker pages fully functional with proper select box text visibility, tab state isolation, and no toast loops.

admin_credits_display.details: Admin user shows 999,999,999 credits correctly in header on dashboard, Comix AI, and GIF Maker pages

character_tab_select_boxes.details: Comic Style shows 'Classic Comic - Bold lines, vibrant colors, classic superhero style', Character Type shows 'Portrait (10 credits)'

panels_tab_select_boxes.details: Style shows 'Classic Comic', Panel Count shows '1 Panel (10 cr)', Genre shows 'Action', Mood shows 'Exciting'

story_mode_tab.details: Style shows 'Classic Comic', Panels shows '6 Panels', Genre shows 'Adventure'. Download button area exists showing 'Generate: 10 credits | Download: 20 credits'

tab_state_isolation.details: All 3 tabs maintain separate state - switching between Character, Panels, and Story Mode tabs multiple times shows each tab's empty result panel correctly without state bleeding

gif_maker_select_boxes.details: Style shows 'Cartoon Style', Background shows 'Transparent (PNG)', Animation Intensity shows 'Medium (8 frames - Balanced)'

emotion_buttons_selection.details: All 12 emotion buttons are clickable and show pink border selection state when clicked

infinite_toast_loop.details: No infinite toast loop detected - 0 active toasts after navigation and tab switching

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/05_story_mode_tab.png - Story Mode with select boxes and download area
